message:
🌱 Refactor: Adopt useCardData hook across 12 more card components (#181) (#242)

Phase 4b of the useCardData adoption. Converts 12 card components from
manual useState/useMemo/usePagination patterns to the centralized
useCardData hook, with CardSearchInput, CardControlsRow, and
CardPaginationFooter shared UI components.

Converted cards:
- ChartVersions, EventStream, GPUOverview, HelmHistory
- HelmValuesDiff, NamespaceRBAC, OpenCostOverview, OperatorSubscriptions
- RecentEvents, WarningEvents, LLMModels, MLNotebooks

Net reduction: ~317 lines (979 insertions, 1296 deletions)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
